a:T328a,<div class="question">
<p>A ring of area <em>S</em> is in a uniform magnetic field <em>X</em>. Initially the magnetic field is perpendicular to the plane of the ring. The ring is rotated by 180° about the axis in time <em>T</em>.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>What is the average induced emf in the ring?</p>
<p> </p>
<p>A.   0</p>
<p>B.   <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{{XS}}{{2T}}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mi>X</mi>
<mi>S</mi>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mn>2</mn>
<mi>T</mi>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
</math></span></p>
<p>C.   <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{{XS}}{{T}}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mi>X</mi>
<mi>S</mi>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mi>T</mi>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
</math></span><br/><br/>D.   <span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\frac{{2XS}}{{T}}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mn>2</mn>
<mi>X</mi>
<mi>S</mi>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mi>T</mi>
</mrow>
</mfrac>
</math></span></p>
